seoTitle: Cape Le Grand vs Capel — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Le Grand and Capel. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Le Grand vs Capel: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Le Grand and Capel.
heading: Cape Le Grand vs Capel — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Le Grand, Western Australia and Capel, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Le Grand has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Capel (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Le Grand or Capel safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Le Grand has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Capel scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Le Grand scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Capel scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Le Grand or Capel?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Le Grand has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

internalLinks.label: Cape Le Grand Should I Buy?

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
